summary: Full end-to-end testing of Indian Equity Option Chain feature. Backend: 21/21 tests pass. Frontend: All critical flows verified via Playwright — OC button, modal layout, call/put row clicks, expiry dropdown, crypto exclusion.

minor.issue: NSE live API is blocked in test environment — backend correctly falls back to Black-Scholes derived chain using yfinance historical vol. Data is valid and usable. Note: 'BS-Derived' label shown in modal header. This is expected fallback behavior.

integration_issues.flow: Put row click for deep OTM puts (far from ATM)
integration_issues.issue: Deep OTM put rows (e.g., put-row-1050, put-row-1075 for RELIANCE at ~1307) show '—' and are correctly disabled via HTML disabled attribute. Playwright's `get_attribute('disabled')` returns '' (empty string, falsy in Python) which caused initial test confusion. `is_enabled()` check correctly identifies disabled puts. Functionally correct - clicking disabled puts does nothing.

critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: BS-Derived chain shows change_pct as +0.00% for all rows (since it's synthetic/computed, not from live prices). This is cosmetically odd but technically correct since there's no live option price history. Consider showing 'N/A' instead of '+0.00%' for BS-derived chains to avoid misleading users.
MINOR: The OC modal ATM scroll (setTimeout 150ms) might miss the ATM row if modal renders slowly on slow connections. Consider using a callback after data loads instead of fixed timeout.

MINOR: Deep OTM put rows (strikes much lower than ATM for RELIANCE) show no put data ('—') while the corresponding call data exists. This is expected BS-derived behavior but users might be confused why only ~10 of 21 put rows are clickable.

INFO: Option intraday ticker format uses OPTSTK prefix (NSE format) when available, falls back to BS-synthesized bars. Bars from BS have '21 Jan 70' timestamp artifact in the chart (epoch time issue) — visible in screenshots. Check if timestamp conversion is correct for BS-synthesized bars.
seed_data_creation: None — tests use live backend APIs with RELIANCE, TCS, Infosys stocks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Option chain feature fully tested and working. Backend: /api/option-chain/equity/{symbol} and /api/option/equity-intraday both return 200 with valid data. Frontend: OC button (data-testid=option-chain-btn) visible for equity stocks, not for crypto/options. Modal (data-testid=option-chain-modal) opens correctly with 3-column CALL|STRIKE|PUT layout. Expiry dropdown works (4 monthly expiries). ATM row highlighted. Call/put row clicks load option chart and close modal. One cosmetic issue: BS-synthesized bars may show Jan 1970 timestamp artifact in chart - check if worth fixing.

feature_test_results.atm_price_banner_visible: PASS - ATM row highlighted with price banner
feature_test_results.put_rows_clickable: PASS - 10 enabled put rows near/above ATM
feature_test_results.oc_button_absent_for_crypto: PASS - OC not shown for BTC
